monitor.notes: New gauge look, matched to the standalone AXIS gauge: the arcs now render with a smooth dithered gradient (no visible banding), start with a clean FLAT edge (no rounded blob at the base), and the fill ramps 10%→100% brightness. The bar page gets square ends + the same gradient. Support readouts are sized up a touch (13pt) for readability. Purely visual — all channels/telemetry unchanged.

New A/F (air-fuel ratio) channel — place it on any page as 'A/F' (10–20) or as 'λ' lambda (0.70–1.30). It's the ECU's commanded/target mixture (from OBD PID 0x44), so it reads ~14.6 at cruise and richens under boost/full throttle; the gauge hides it automatically if your car doesn't report it. Also: gear now auto-detects the gearbox (Aisin AWF8 vs ZF 8HP) for a more accurate calculated gear. Includes the v0.2 release: working screen brightness, per-page arc colour + redline, all OBD channels, and wireless (OTA) updates.

node.notes: Fixes wireless (over-the-air) updates to the sensor, which were failing with a 'write error'. The sensor now saves the incoming firmware safely in the background instead of during the radio callback, matching how the display already updates itself. NOTE: because this fix lives in the sensor's own update receiver, this one version has to be installed by USB cable — after that, all future sensor updates go wirelessly as normal. Includes the v0.4.0 battery-save fix (engine-off deep sleep, <10 V threshold, instant CAN-wake) and everything from v0.3.x (A/F channel, gearbox auto-detect).

Battery-save fix: the sensor now recognises the engine-off state (the car's control-module voltage reads ~0.2 V when parked) and goes to deep sleep, so it no longer keeps the 12 V battery awake while the car sits. The off threshold is <10 V; it wakes instantly the moment the car's CAN bus comes alive (ignition/unlock). Includes everything from v0.3.x — the A/F (air-fuel) channel, gearbox auto-detect, and instant CAN-wake reconnect.

Adds the A/F (air-fuel ratio) reading — the sensor now decodes the ECU's commanded mixture (OBD PID 0x44) so the gauge can show A/F or lambda. Gear calculation now auto-detects the gearbox: it fits both an Aisin AWF8 and a ZF 8HP ratio table against live rpm÷speed and locks onto whichever matches your car. Includes v0.2.2's instant CAN-wake reconnect + no-drain sleep.
